description: MOW (Magee-Oh-Winter 2019) theorem matching not verified: the original paper does not supply explicit constants, and Calderon-Magee (2025) gives explicit gap only for untwisted operators. No detailed constant-tracking appendix shows how epsilon and D0 are derived from published theorems.
action_taken: Cannot resolve without detailed constant-tracking through MOW (Crelle 2019). The original paper uses asymptotic notation throughout. Extracting explicit constants requires a dedicated appendix. Planned: feed full MOW paper to o3-pro for constant propagation attempt. This is weeks of work, not hours.
